name: CFmon.clcalipsoSouth30
title: CALIPSO Percentage Cloud Cover
description: Percentage cloud cover in CALIPSO standard atmospheric layers.
processing note:
40 height levels. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean where air,
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.clcalipsoSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
